title: ShareFate
description: This project is a Minecraft Forge mod that implements a “chain death” mechanic: when one player dies, all other players in the same server are instantly killed. Fun stupid minigame to play woth your annoying friends..
body:
# SharedFate – Minecraft Mod

## **MULTIPLAYER REQUIRED FOR MOD TO TAKE ACTION**

## Overview:

SharedFate is a thrilling Minecraft mod that transforms death into a game-changing event. When any player dies, a chain reaction is triggered, instantly affecting all other players in the same world. This mechanic introduces high-stakes tension and encourages strategic play in multiplayer environments.

## Key Features:

- Chain-Reaction Deaths: The first player’s death sets off a chain, impacting everyone else in the world. Only the initiating player is announced, avoiding spammy notifications.
- Global Messaging: Players receive a clear, single global message indicating who caused the chain reaction. Adds drama and awareness without cluttering the chat.
- Strategic Gameplay: Knowing that death can have massive consequences changes how players approach combat, exploration, and interactions. Perfect for minigames or high-stakes multiplayer sessions.
- Fully Multiplayer Compatible: Designed for servers and LAN worlds, ensuring all players experience the effect simultaneously.
- Immersive Experience: Turns ordinary gameplay into suspenseful, unpredictable encounters that make every choice matter.

## Why Play SharedFate:
If your friends are idiots and want to test each other for some reason..
